news-global-econ.title: $290M cocaine haul found ‘skillfully concealed’ in massive banana shipment
news-global-econ.description: Italian officials said the 1,700-pound haul of cocaine, hidden among banana pallets, could have generated roughly $290 million on the street.

news-global-econ.title: India weighs letting airport owners run airlines to curb duopoly
news-global-econ.description: India considers allowing airport owners to operate airlines, potentially disrupting the duopoly held by IndiGo and Air India.

news-global-econ.title: Vulnerable Republican wins GOP primary in Arizona toss-up district Dems aim to flip blue
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Juan Ciscomani will face Democrat JoAnna Mendoza in a toss-up Arizona House race that could determine which party controls Congress after midterms.

news-global-econ.title: Yen slides past 163 mark to fresh 40-year low against US dollar
news-global-econ.description: Japan’s currency fell as much as 0.5% to 163.24 per dollar overnight as the greenback strengthened alongside US Treasury yields after renewed tensions in the US-Iran conflict drove oil prices higher.

news-global-soc.title: India weighs letting airport owners run airlines to curb duopoly
news-global-soc.description: India considers allowing airport owners to operate airlines, potentially disrupting the duopoly held by IndiGo and Air India.

news-global-soc.title: Trump wants FIFA President Gianni Infantino to become the next UN secretary-general: report
news-global-soc.description: Trump reportedly wants FIFA President Gianni Infantino to become the next UN secretary-general, citing his ability to bring people together.

news-global-soc.title: REPORT: Trump Wants FIFA Boss Gianni Infantino for UN Secretary-General
news-global-soc.description:
After the recent success of the North American-hosted World Cup, President Trump wants FIFA boss Gianni Infantino as the next U.N. Secretary-General, the New York Post reports.

news-global-soc.title: Judge Urges SCOTUS to Give 'Benchslaps' for 9th Circuit's Gun Rulings
news-global-soc.description:
Ninth Circuit Judge Lawrence VanDyke is urging SCOTUS to issue some "benchslaps" for his own court's gun rulings

news-global-soc.title: US counterintelligence ‘way behind,’ post-9/11 record ‘extraordinarily negligent’, fmr Trump WH official warns
news-global-soc.description: H.R. McMaster accused Washington of being "extraordinarily negligent" on counterintelligence while China and Russia exploited America's post-9/11 focus.
